<current_datetime>2026-05-02T01:42:58.786Z</current_datetime>

Migrate this .NET 8 library and web API to .NET 9. It was compiled against .NET 9 RC2.
The ICache service is only registered as a non-keyed service.
Identify all breaking changes and provide the exact fixes.

input.initialPrompt:
Migrate this .NET 8 library and web API to .NET 9. It was compiled against .NET 9 RC2.
The ICache service is only registered as a non-keyed service.
Identify all breaking changes and provide the exact fixes.

data.reasoningText: Let me look at the files in the current working directory to understand the codebase.

data.content:
Here are the **3 breaking changes** and their fixes:

---

## 1. `MyLib.csproj` — Target framework must be `net9.0`

## 2. `ApiController.cs` — `[FromKeyedServices]` fails at runtime when the service is only registered as non-keyed

In .NET 9, resolving a keyed service that was registered as non-keyed **no longer falls back** — it throws. Since `ICache` is only registered as a non-keyed service, remove the keyed attribute:

toolCalls.name: edit
toolCalls.args: {"old_str": "    public ApiController([FromKeyedServices(\"cache\")] ICache cache) { }", "new_str": "    public ApiController(ICache cache) { }", "path": "/tmp/sv-30dbed88a82a49998306b61614ccd290/ApiController.cs"}

data.content: Also, `HttpListenerRequest.UserAgent` is now **nullable** (`string?`). Direct `.Length` access produces a **nullable warning / potential NRE**:

## 3. `StringUtils.cs` — `String.Trim(ReadOnlySpan<char>)` was removed after RC2; and `[InlineArray]` max size reduced

The `params ReadOnlySpan<char>` overload of `Trim` existed in .NET 9 RC2 but was **removed in GA**. Recompiling resolves to `Trim(char[])`, so pass an array. Also, .NET 9 GA **limits `[InlineArray]` to 1 MB (1048576 elements)**; 1048577 is now illegal:

toolCalls.name: edit

data.content:
---

### Summary of breaking changes

| # | File | Breaking Change (.NET 9 GA) | Fix |
|---|------|----------------------------|-----|
| 1 | `MyLib.csproj` | TFM still targets `net8.0` | → `net9.0` |
| 2 | `ApiController.cs` | `[FromKeyedServices]` no longer resolves non-keyed registrations | Remove attribute; inject directly |
| 3 | `ApiController.cs` | `HttpListenerRequest.UserAgent` is now `string?` | Null-conditional access |
| 4 | `StringUtils.cs` | `String.Trim(params ReadOnlySpan<char>)` removed in GA | Use `char[]` overload |
| 5 | `StringUtils.cs` | `[InlineArray]` max size reduced to 1,048,576 | Reduce element count to 1048576 |
